item.title: Ben Thompson on Tim Cook’s Legacy 摘要
item.description:
The article analyzes Tim Cook's leadership at Apple, highlighting his operational genius in transforming Apple's supply chain by shifting manufacturing to China and creating a just-in-time system with no major product recalls. It credits Cook for overseeing successful new products like AirPods and Apple Watch, which generate significant revenue, and for elevating Services to 26% of revenue and 41% of profit, bringing balance to Apple's financials. The piece argues that Cook's focus on Services protected Apple's hardware-centric mission, as evidenced by the appointment of hardware head John Ternus as his successor.
标签: Apple, Tim Cook, leadership, supply chain, product management, Services, Wearables, business strategy, operational excellence, CEO transition

item.title: Qwen3.6-27B: Flagship-Level Coding in a 27B Dense Model 摘要
item.description:
Qwen has released Qwen3.6-27B, a 27-billion-parameter dense open-weight model claiming flagship-level agentic coding performance, surpassing the previous-generation Qwen3.5-397B-A17B MoE model across major coding benchmarks. The model is significantly smaller at 55.6GB compared to 807GB. A user tested a 16.8GB quantized version locally using llama-server, generating detailed SVGs like a pelican riding a bicycle with good quality, achieving ~25 tokens/second generation speed. The article includes performance metrics and example outputs, highlighting its potential for efficient local AI coding tasks.
标签: AI, LLM, open-source, coding, benchmarks, local-LLM, model-release, Qwen, quantization, performance

item.title: Exclusive: Microsoft Moving All GitHub Copilot Subscribers To Token-Based Billing In June 摘要
item.description:
Microsoft plans to transition all GitHub Copilot customers to token-based billing starting in June, as revealed by internal documents. Copilot Business customers will pay $19 per user per month for $30 in pooled AI credits, while Enterprise customers will pay $39 for $70 in credits, though amounts may change. The announcement is expected on April 23. This shift from a request-based system to paying for actual token usage aims to address rising AI compute costs. It remains unclear how individual Pro or Pro+ subscribers will be affected.
标签: Microsoft, GitHub Copilot, AI, billing, token-based, enterprise, software development, pricing, subscription, cost management

item.title: Writing an LLM from scratch, part 33 -- what I learned from finally getting round to the appendices 摘要
item.description:
The author reflects on reading the appendices of 'Build a Large Language Model (from Scratch)' after completing the main content and initial training goals. Key insights include: Appendix A's PyTorch overview was useful, especially on DistributedDataParallel for multi-GPU training, though learning by doing provided deeper understanding. Appendix D covered gradient clipping and learning rate scheduling, which the author had previously explored independently. Appendix E's LoRA implementation with full code was particularly inspiring for future projects. The author concludes that while the appendices could have saved time, hands-on experimentation led to better internalization of concepts, and plans to next build a GPT-2-style model in JAX as a final challenge.
标签: LLM, PyTorch, JAX, machine-learning, training, DistributedDataParallel, LoRA, deep-learning, education, hands-on-learning

item.title: There Are Corrections, and There Are Corrections 摘要
item.description:
The article highlights a humorous correction from The New York Times regarding the New York Mets' 11th straight loss, noting it occurred on Sunday rather than Monday, with the witty remark that 'Even the Mets cannot lose on an off day.' It compares this correction to the iconic New York Post headline 'Headless Body in Topless Bar,' praising it as a perfect example of editorial corrections.
标签: journalism, corrections, humor, New York Times, sports, editing, media, baseball, New York Mets, headlines

item.title: DF T-Shirts and Hoodies: Get Them While the Getting Is Good 摘要
item.description:
Daring Fireball is offering t-shirts and hoodies again, with orders starting to be printed at the end of this week and shipped next week. The hoodies are a new model from Bella Canvas, replacing the previous heather gray blend (50% polyester, 37.5% cotton, 12.5% rayon) with a heather black version made of 85% cotton and 15% polyester. The new hoodies are described as feeling even better than the old ones.
标签: merchandise, clothing, e-commerce, branding, Daring Fireball, apparel, retail, product launch, fashion, blog merchandise
